member.name: T:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.AllowIn
member.summary: The flags of HTML element that will be allowed hotkey works.

member.name: F:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.AllowIn.None
member.summary: Default. The hot key feature will not be work when the INPUT or TEXTAREA element has focus.

member.name: F:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.AllowIn.Input
member.summary: The hot key feature also works when the INPUT element has focus.

member.name: F:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.AllowIn.TextArea
member.summary: The hot key feature also works when the TEXTAREA element has focus.

member.name: F:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.AllowIn.NonTextInput
member.summary: The hot key feature also works when a non-text INPUT element, such as a checkbox or toggle, has focus.

member.name: T:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyDownEventArgs
member.summary: Provides data for the KeyDown eventsof HotKeys service.

member.name: P:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyDownEventArgs.ModKeys
member.summary: Get the combination of modifier keys flags.

member.name: P:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyDownEventArgs.Key
member.summary: Get the identifier of the key that is pressed.

member.name: P:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyDownEventArgs.NativeKey
member.summary:
Get the value of the "key" property in the HTML Keyboard event object, that taking into consideration the state of modifier keys such as Shift as well as the keyboard locale and layout.
(https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/KeyboardEvent/key/Key_Values)

member.name: P:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyDownEventArgs.NativeCode
member.summary:
Get the value of the "code" property in the HTML Keyboard event object, that represents a physical key on the keyboard.
(https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/KeyboardEvent/code/code_values)

member.name: P:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyDownEventArgs.SrcElementTagName
member.summary: Get the tag name of HTML element that is source of the DOM event.

member.name: P:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyDownEventArgs.SrcElementTypeAttribute
member.summary: Get the type attribute, if any, of the HTML element that is source of the DOM event.

member.name: P:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyDownEventArgs.IsWasm
member.summary: Get the runtime environment is on a WebAssembly (Web browser), or not.

member.name: P:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyDownEventArgs.PreventDefault
member.summary:
Get or set the flag to determine prevent default behavior or not.
[IMPORTANT NOTICE] When set this property to true on a Blazor Server App (not a WebAssembly app), will be thrown.
("PreventDefault" behavior is not supported on Blazor Server App.)

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyDownEventArgs.#ctor(Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.ModKeys,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.Keys,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the HotKeyDownEventArgs class.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyDownEventArgs.#ctor(Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.ModKeys,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.Keys,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the HotKeyDownEventArgs class.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyDownEventArgs.#ctor(Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.ModKeys,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.Keys,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the HotKeyDownEventArgs class.

member.name: T:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry
member.summary: Association of key combination and callback action.

member.name: P:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry.ModKeys
member.summary: Get the combination of modifier keys flags.

member.name: P:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry.Key
member.summary: Get the identifier of hotkey.

member.name: P:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry.KeyName
member.summary:
Get the name if the identifier of hotkey.
The "key name" is a bit different from the "key" and "code" properties of the DOM event object.
The "key name" comes from "key" and "code", but it is tried to converting to one of the Keys enum values names.
if the keyboard event is not covered by Keys enum values, the "key name" will be the value of "code" or "key".

member.name: P:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry.Description
member.summary: Get the description of the meaning of this hot key entry.

member.name: P:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry.AllowIn
member.summary: Get the combination of HTML element flags that will be allowed hotkey works.

member.name: P:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry.Action
member.summary: Get the callback action that will be invoked when user enter modKeys + key combination on the browser.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry.#ctor(Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.ModKeys,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.Keys,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.AllowIn,System.String,System.Func{Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the HotKeyEntry class.
member.param: The combination of modifier keys flags.
The identifier of hotkey.
The callback action that will be invoked when user enter modKeys + key combination on the browser.
The description of the meaning of this hot key entry.
The combination of HTML element flags that will be allowed hotkey works.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry.#ctor(Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.ModKeys,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.Keys,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.AllowIn,System.String,System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the HotKeyEntry class.
member.param: The combination of modifier keys flags.
The identifier of hotkey.
The callback action that will be invoked when user enter modKeys + key combination on the browser.
The description of the meaning of this hot key entry.
The combination of HTML element flags that will be allowed hotkey works.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry.#ctor(Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.ModKeys,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.Keys,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.AllowIn,System.String,System.Action{Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry})
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the HotKeyEntry class.
member.param: The combination of modifier keys flags.
The identifier of hotkey.
The callback action that will be invoked when user enter modKeys + key combination on the browser.
The description of the meaning of this hot key entry.
The combination of HTML element flags that will be allowed hotkey works.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry.#ctor(Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.ModKeys,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.Keys,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.AllowIn,System.String,System.Action)
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the HotKeyEntry class.
member.param: The combination of modifier keys flags.
The identifier of hotkey.
The callback action that will be invoked when user enter modKeys + key combination on the browser.
The description of the meaning of this hot key entry.
The combination of HTML element flags that will be allowed hotkey works.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry.#ctor(Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.ModKeys,System.String,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.AllowIn,System.String,System.Func{Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the HotKeyEntry class.
member.param: The combination of modifier keys flags.

The name of the identifier of hotkey.
The "key name" is a bit different from the "key" and "code" properties of the DOM event object.
The "key name" comes from "key" and "code", but it is tried to converting to one of the Keys enum values names.
if the keyboard event is not covered by Keys enum values, the "key name" will be the value of "code" or "key".
The callback action that will be invoked when user enter modKeys + key combination on the browser.
The description of the meaning of this hot key entry.
The combination of HTML element flags that will be allowed hotkey works.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry.#ctor(Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.ModKeys,System.String,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.AllowIn,System.String,System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the HotKeyEntry class.
member.param: The combination of modifier keys flags.

The name of the identifier of hotkey.
The "key name" is a bit different from the "key" and "code" properties of the DOM event object.
The "key name" comes from "key" and "code", but it is tried to converting to one of the Keys enum values names.
if the keyboard event is not covered by Keys enum values, the "key name" will be the value of "code" or "key".
The callback action that will be invoked when user enter modKeys + key combination on the browser.
The description of the meaning of this hot key entry.
The combination of HTML element flags that will be allowed hotkey works.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry.#ctor(Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.ModKeys,System.String,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.AllowIn,System.String,System.Action{Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry})
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the HotKeyEntry class.
member.param: The combination of modifier keys flags.

The name of the identifier of hotkey.
The "key name" is a bit different from the "key" and "code" properties of the DOM event object.
The "key name" comes from "key" and "code", but it is tried to converting to one of the Keys enum values names.
if the keyboard event is not covered by Keys enum values, the "key name" will be the value of "code" or "key".
The callback action that will be invoked when user enter modKeys + key combination on the browser.
The description of the meaning of this hot key entry.
The combination of HTML element flags that will be allowed hotkey works.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry.#ctor(Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.ModKeys,System.String,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.AllowIn,System.String,System.Action)
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the HotKeyEntry class.
member.param: The combination of modifier keys flags.

The name of the identifier of hotkey.
The "key name" is a bit different from the "key" and "code" properties of the DOM event object.
The "key name" comes from "key" and "code", but it is tried to converting to one of the Keys enum values names.
if the keyboard event is not covered by Keys enum values, the "key name" will be the value of "code" or "key".
The callback action that will be invoked when user enter modKeys + key combination on the browser.
The description of the meaning of this hot key entry.
The combination of HTML element flags that will be allowed hotkey works.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry.ToString
member.summary: Returns a String that combined key combination and description of this entry, like "Ctrl+A: Select All."

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry.ToString(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a String formatted with specified format string.
member.param: {0} will be replaced with key combination text, and {1} will be replaced with description of this hotkey entry object.

member.name: T:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeys
member.summary: A service that provides Hotkey feature.

member.name: E:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeys.KeyDown
member.summary: Occurs when the user enter any keys on the browser.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeys.#ctor(Microsoft.JSInterop.IJSRuntime)
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the HotKeys class.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeys.Attach
member.summary: Attach this HotKeys service instance to JavaScript DOM event handler.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeys.CreateContext
member.summary: Create hotkey entries context, and activate it.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeys.OnKeyDown(Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.ModKeys,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: The method that will be invoked from JavaScript keydown event handler.
member.param: The combination of modifier keys flags.
The identifier of hotkey.
The tag name of HTML element that is source of the DOM event.
The typeattribute, if any, of the HTML element that is source of the DOM event
The value of the "key" property in the DOM event object
The value of the "code" property in the DOM event object

member.name: T:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeysContext
member.summary: Current active hotkeys set.

member.name: P:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeysContext.Keys
member.summary: The collection of Hotkey entries.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeysContext.#ctor(Microsoft.JSInterop.IJSRuntime,System.Threading.Tasks.Task)
member.summary: Initialize a new instance of the HotKeysContext class.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeysContext.Add(Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.ModKeys,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.Keys,System.Func{Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeyEntry,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.String,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.AllowIn)
member.summary:
Add a new hotkey entry to this context.
if the key that you want to hook is not covered by the Keys enum values, use the other overload version that accepts key name as a string.
member.param: The combination of modifier keys flags.
The identifier of hotkey.
The callback action that will be invoked when user enter modKeys + key combination on the browser.
The description of the meaning of this hot key entry.
The combination of HTML element flags that will be allowed hotkey works.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeysContext.Add(Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.ModKeys,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.Keys,System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.String,Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.AllowIn)
member.summary:
Add a new hotkey entry to this context.
if the key that you want to hook is not covered by the Keys enum values, use the other overload version that accepts key name as a string.
member.param: The combination of modifier keys flags.
The identifier of hotkey.
The callback action that will be invoked when user enter modKeys + key combination on the browser.
The description of the meaning of this hot key entry.
The combination of HTML element flags that will be allowed hotkey works.

member.summary:
Add a new hotkey entry to this context.
if the key that you want to hook is not covered by the Keys enum values, use this overload version that accepts key name as a string.

The name of the identifier of hotkey.
The "key name" is a bit different from the "key" and "code" properties of the DOM event object.
The "key name" comes from "key" and "code", but it is tried to converting to one of the Keys enum values names.
if the keyboard event is not covered by Keys enum values, the "key name" will be the value of "code" or "key".
The callback action that will be invoked when user enter modKeys + key combination on the browser.
The description of the meaning of this hot key entry.
The combination of HTML element flags that will be allowed hotkey works.

The "key name" is a bit different from the "key" and "code" properties of the DOM event object.

if the keyboard event is not covered by Keys enum values, the "key name" will be the value of "code" or "key".

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.HotKeysContext.Dispose
member.summary: Deactivate the hot key entry contained in this context.

member.name: T:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.Keys
member.summary: The identifier of the key code.

member.name: T:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.KeysExtensions
member.summary: The extension methods for "Keys" enum type.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.KeysExtensions.ToKeyString(Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.Keys)
member.summary: Returns a String that represent readable key name of this Keys enum value, like "Top", "Left", "Enter", "A", "B", "C", etc.

member.name: T:Toolbelt.Blazor.HotKeys.ModKeys
member.summary: The flags of modifier keys.

member.name: T:Toolbelt.Blazor.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HotKeysExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for adding Hoteys service.

member.name: M:Toolbelt.Blazor.Extensions.DependencyInjection.HotKeysExtensions.AddHotKeys(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds a HotKeys service to the specified Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection.
member.param: The Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection to add the service to.
